per_question.judge_notes: The answer correctly identifies the condensation with oxaloacetate and the product citrate, but fails to name the enzyme (citrate synthase) or mention the generation of cofactors/CO2. No IDs were fabricated.
The answer covers all required biochemical steps and does not contain any fabricated IDs.
The answer correctly identifies all enzymes, products, and co-substrates required for the pathway and provides accurate EC numbers without any fabricated IDs.
The agent provided a search query instead of a substantive answer.
The answer correctly identifies the substrates, the microbial distribution, the convergence on IPP/DMAPP, and contains no fabricated IDs.
The answer correctly identifies pyruvate, lists glycolysis, the TCA cycle, and both gluconeogenesis and alanine metabolism. All KEGG map IDs provided are real.
